en.name: Kun Zhang
en.tagline: I build and study language models — and I learn fastest by shipping experiments in the open.
en.intro: MSc Advanced Computer Science at the University of Leeds, focused on NLP and large language models. Most of what I know comes from hands-on competition work, all of it documented in public.

zh.kicker: 硕士 · 自然语言处理与大语言模型
zh.name: 张鲲
zh.tagline: 我既动手构建语言模型，也研究它们——而我学得最快的方式，是把实验公开地做出来。
zh.intro: 利兹大学高级计算机科学硕士，专注于自然语言处理与大语言模型。我的大部分经验来自亲手参与的竞赛实践，并且全程公开记录。
